responsibilities.title: Event Lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: named_volunteer_list_or_membership_delta | p5_commitment_sheet_or_membership | leadership_map_or_open_recruitment_ask | photo_or_activity_note | p5_check_in | follow_up_completion_within_7_days | calendar_entry_or_owner_note | wave_checklist_signoff | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Event Lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Locate venue, run logistics with Logistics Lead, keep the event funnel moving toward Power of Five launches.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: named_volunteer_list_or_membership_delta | p5_commitment_sheet_or_membership | leadership_map_or_open_recruitment_ask | photo_or_activity_note | p5_check_in | follow_up_completion_within_7_days | calendar_entry_or_owner_note | wave_checklist_signoff | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Event Lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Confirm venue/parking/weather backup; stand up local event committee; sync calendar; drive timeline to Central Field/Volunteer Management.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.

responsibilities.title: Event Lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Run arrival → sign-in → registration check → Meet Kelly → Power of Five invite → role choice → training invite.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.

responsibilities.title: Event Lead — after event
responsibilities.body: Within 24h: thank-yous, photo recap, P5 kickoff invites. Within 1 week: orientation and neighborhood meetings.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: named_volunteer_list_or_membership_delta | p5_commitment_sheet_or_membership | leadership_map_or_open_recruitment_ask | photo_or_activity_note | p5_check_in | follow_up_completion_within_7_days | calendar_entry_or_owner_note | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Event Lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Coordinate with Canvassing Lead on Saturday-prior door hangers inviting neighbors to meet Kelly.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.

responsibilities.title: Event Lead — election week
responsibilities.body: Every event should seed Power of Five capacity that later covers polls and October Strike Team Saturdays.
responsibilities.summary: Owns local event execution so the stop leaves permanent organization, not just a crowd.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Launch the social campaign with Central Social; plan pure social after-event; recruit through civic life.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Wave One graphics with Central Social; Wave Two community calendars, FB groups, Nextdoor, org shares; Wave Three reminders.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Capture content, welcome newcomers, steer people to sign-in and Power of Five.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — after event
responsibilities.body: Photos/recap within 24h; after-event social plan; keep new contacts in the volunteer funnel.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Support shared messaging for door hangers and partner asks.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Social Media Lead — election week
responsibilities.body: Sustain recognition and digital toolkit use for Power of Five leaders.
responsibilities.summary: Local social + community belonging; pairs with Central Social for campaign graphics and protocol.

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Door hangers the Saturday before inviting people to meet Kelly and share community concerns.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Map radius; train walkers; coordinate literature/door hangers; sync with Recruitment and Registration leads.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Greeters and pathing; capture volunteer interest from walk conversations.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — after event
responsibilities.body: Log doors, shifts, and follow-ups; feed Power of Five neighborhood coverage.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Primary lane — neighborhood walk, business visits where useful, Saturday-prior hangers.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: canvass_turf_log | canvass_or_phone_contact_log | turf_completion_note | shift_roster | photo_or_activity_note | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Canvassing Lead — election week
responsibilities.body: October Saturdays: canvass + Strike Team cookout staging with local candidates where appropriate.
responsibilities.summary: Neighborhood outreach around the event radius and October Strike Team Saturdays.

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: named_volunteer_list_or_membership_delta | p5_commitment_sheet_or_membership | leadership_map_or_open_recruitment_ask | partner_touch_log | p5_check_in | follow_up_completion_within_7_days | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Build the local volunteer base around the event so the stop creates lasting organizers.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: named_volunteer_list_or_membership_delta | p5_commitment_sheet_or_membership | leadership_map_or_open_recruitment_ask | partner_touch_log | p5_check_in | follow_up_completion_within_7_days | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Fill open leads/co-leads; ask every contact to bring a friend; feed orientation pipeline.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Meet volunteers station; convert attendees into Power of Five / volunteer roles.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — after event
responsibilities.body: 24h interest follow-up; 1 week orientation; move people up the leadership ladder.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.
responsibilities.completion_evidence_requirement: named_volunteer_list_or_membership_delta | p5_commitment_sheet_or_membership | leadership_map_or_open_recruitment_ask | partner_touch_log | p5_check_in | follow_up_completion_within_7_days | operator_review_of_field_plan_source

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Recruit canvassers for Saturday-prior and October Strike Team Saturdays.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.

responsibilities.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead — election week
responsibilities.body: Grow reliable volunteers toward poll coverage and precinct leadership.
responsibilities.summary: Local volunteer recruitment lead — works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager.

responsibilities.title: Community/Social Lead — awaiting Field Plan responsibilities
responsibilities.body: Detailed responsibilities will be populated from the campaign Field Plan.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Separate operation from launch-team: county/city/campus/neighborhood registration goals.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Staff registration check at event funnel; recruit registration shifts for markets, faith, campuses.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Voter registration check is a required step in the arrival funnel.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — after event
responsibilities.body: Count completed registrations; schedule follow-on registration opportunities.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Pair registration asks with door/neighborhood work where lawful and appropriate.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: Voter Registration Lead — election week
responsibilities.body: Registered-and-ready universe supports GOTV and poll coverage later.
responsibilities.summary: Hits registration goals; builds local registration team plans with Central Voter Registration Director.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Run phone/text invitation banks tied to the event catalyst timeline.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Wave Three reminder calls; volunteer asks; confirm location/parking language.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Standby for last-minute confirmation calls if needed.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — after event
responsibilities.body: Thank-you / orientation invites for new interested contacts.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Complement doors with phone follow-up on soft IDs.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: phone bank lead — election week
responsibilities.body: Later used for GOTV reminders — keep lists clean with Data Team.
responsibilities.summary: Invitations, volunteer asks, bring-a-friend, and follow-up around the event.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — role summary
responsibilities.body: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — always active
responsibilities.body: Handwritten outreach timed to the event and later GOTV.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — before event
responsibilities.body: Drop to targeted universe before Wave Three reminders.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — event day
responsibilities.body: Not primary; may collect thank-you writers.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — after event
responsibilities.body: Thank-you cards for hosts/partners where useful.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — canvassing
responsibilities.body: Coordinate universes so doors and cards do not collide wastefully.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.

responsibilities.title: postcard lead — election week
responsibilities.body: Reliable vehicle for October reminders.
responsibilities.summary: Targeted postcard universe — often older/reliable/independent households.
